Home / Service Areas / Irvine

Window replacement company in Irvine, CA

Trusted local professionals serving Irvine and surrounding communities

Serving Irvine, CA

1st Windows is dedicated to providing high-quality window replacement services to the residents of Irvine, California. As a master-planned community with homes primarily built from the 1970s to the present, Irvine features a variety of modern architectural styles. We offer a wide selection of window types and styles to perfectly complement these homes. Irvine's warm, dry climate means that energy efficiency is a key consideration for homeowners. Our energy-efficient windows can help you save money on your energy bills while also keeping your home comfortable year-round. We are committed to providing exceptional service and quality workmanship to all of our customers in Irvine.

Irvine's master-planned community homes, built from the 1970s onward, benefit from energy-efficient window solutions due to the warm, dry climate.

Window Replacement

Upgrade your home with energy-efficient, beautiful new windows.

Dual-Pane Window Replacement

Maximize energy savings with dual-pane window solutions.

Custom Window Installation

Unique window solutions tailored to your specific needs.

Learn more →

Window Screen Services

Keep bugs out and let the fresh Long Beach air in with our window screen services.

Learn more →
